title: enum logic[2:0] not generating enum in fst file

features.name: enum with logic array base type
features.description: Code should include an enum declaration with a logic[N:0] packed array as the base type, where N > 0
features.snippet:
typedef enum logic[1:0] { ZERO=0, ONE, TWO, THREE } enumed_t;
enumed_t v_enumed;

features.name: enum in case statement state machine
features.description: Code should include an enum variable used in a case statement for state machine-like control flow
